message:
🌱 Update actions/setup-go to v6.2.0

Update actions/setup-go from v6.1.0 to v6.2.0 across all workflow files
and update .gha-reversemap.yml to match.

This combines the changes from PRs #3654 and #3663 which were
incomplete individually - #3654 updated workflows only and #3663
updated reversemap only.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
